mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO b_approval_node (approval_flow_id, node_name, node_code, node_order, approver_type, approver_ids, approver_names, role_id, remark) VALUES
(#{item.approvalFlowId}, #{item.nodeName}, #{item.nodeCode}, #{item.nodeOrder}, #{item.approverType}, #{item.approverIds}, #{item.approverNames}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.remark})
